message: Thank you Living Savior & Bridgeway for sharing the your time & food!!! We were able to help FACETS feed 60 folks dinner
column3: 45 breakfast & provide 40 folks with lunches Feb 15-16. The hypothermia shelter is providing food  and a warm place for homeless to sleep (the week of Feb 14
column4: temperatures were in the low 20s at night).  Again
column5: Living Savior Social Ministry thanks you for sharing your time & treasures!

March for Life Potluck Dinner – January 18th (RSVP to follow)

Hypothermia Prevention Please help Living Savior as we support FACETS and other churches in supplying meals to our homeless neighbors in temporary shelters as part of the area's hypothermia prevention project. Sign up to prepare dinner (main dish, sides, &/or dessert) and/or come to LSLC on Sunday Feb 20 to prepare and pack lunches. Contact Miki Kolton or Steve Thomas for more information or visit Sign Up Genius https://www.signupgenius.com/go/4090a48a5a62b0-hypothermia2#/
